name: Braids
description: Digital macro-oscillator with ~45 synthesis models spanning virtual-analog, waveshaping, FM, formant, physical modeling, wavetable, drums, and noise. LED display + push-encoder exposes quantizer/scales, internal AD envelope, bit-depth, sample-rate, drift, and signature bitcrush.

controls.name: Encoder + LED display
controls.description: Rotates to select synthesis model; push to open hidden menu (META, scales, AD envelope, BITS, RATE, drift, signature, calibration, etc.).

controls.name: COARSE
controls.description: Coarse pitch. Range depends on RANG menu setting (EXT extended, FREE continuous, XTND, or 440Hz lock).

controls.name: FM Attenuverter
controls.description: Scales and inverts the FM CV input. When META is ON in menu, this attenuverter scales CV-driven model selection instead of pitch FM.
controls.detail: CCW: invert · noon: zero · CW: unity

controls.name: TIMBRE
controls.description: Model-dependent primary tone parameter. Generally sweeps brightness or spectral density. Knob position is summed with the attenuverted TIMBRE CV.

controls.name: TIMBRE Attenuverter
controls.description: Scales and inverts the TIMBRE CV input.

controls.name: COLOR
controls.description: Model-dependent secondary tone parameter. Knob position is summed with the COLOR CV (no attenuverter for COLOR).
controls.detail: CV adds to knob; attenuate externally if needed

inputs.name: TRIG
inputs.description: Trigger input. Fires the internal AD envelope (when enabled), acts as the exciter/strike for physical models, and can reset phase on some models. TSRC menu option can auto-generate triggers from V/OCT changes ≥ 1 semitone.

inputs.name: V/OCT
inputs.description: 1V/octave pitch input. Precalibrated; unattenuated. Two-point calibration available via CAL menu.

inputs.name: FM
inputs.description: Frequency modulation — or, when META is enabled in the menu, CV-driven model selection. Scaled/inverted by the FM attenuverter.

inputs.name: TIMBRE
inputs.description: TIMBRE parameter CV, scaled by the TIMBRE attenuverter. CV is summed with the knob position (0V = knob minimum, +5V = knob maximum).

inputs.name: COLOR
inputs.description: COLOR parameter CV. Summed with the COLOR knob (0V = knob minimum, +5V = knob maximum). No attenuverter on the panel.

outputs.name: OUT
outputs.description: Main audio output of the selected synthesis model. Loudness is model-dependent.

behaviors.name: META mode (CV-driven model selection)
behaviors.description: FM CV selects model instead of pitch (pitch FM becomes unavailable while META is on). Slow CV sweeps through models; stepped CV picks discrete algorithms. FM attenuverter sets the span of the sweep. Encoder still works for manual selection.

behaviors.name: Internal AD envelope
behaviors.trigger: TRIG patched + envelope destinations enabled in menu
behaviors.description: TRIG fires a short internal AD envelope with separately routable amounts to FM, TIMBRE, COLOR, and VCA. Firmware 1.8 added the four individual mod destinations, enabling a self-contained voice without external envelopes. Physical models use TRIG as the exciter/strike regardless.

behaviors.name: Auto-trigger from pitch change (TSRC)
behaviors.description: Braids generates its own trigger each time V/OCT changes by ≥ 1 semitone — a self-contained voice follows a pitch sequencer without needing a separate gate cable.

behaviors.name: Internal quantizer (QNTZ + ROOT)
behaviors.description: Quantizes V/OCT + COARSE to a selectable scale with adjustable root. Firmware 1.8 rewrote the scale table, adding ~50 scales (chromatic, major, minor, modal, pentatonic, Japanese, raga, microtonal, etc.). Lets Braids self-quantize imprecise or random CV.

behaviors.name: SIGN (signature waveshaper)
behaviors.description: Adds grungy glitches and waveform imperfections whose exact character is derived from the module's serial number — each Braids has a slightly unique degradation.

behaviors.name: DRFT (analog-style drift)
behaviors.description: Adds slow random pitch drift simulating the instability of a poorly-designed analog VCO. Makes the digital oscillator feel breathing/alive, especially when stacked with other VCOs.

behaviors.name: FLAT (VCO tuning imperfections)
behaviors.description: Recreates the slight tracking/tuning errors of an analog VCO across the keyboard range — separate from DRFT's time-varying drift.

behaviors.name: BITS / RATE (lo-fi rendering)
behaviors.description: BITS reduces DAC word length; RATE drops the internal sample rate (some models natively render at 48 kHz instead of 96 kHz). Together they give vintage-sampler / 8-bit textures without external effects.

behaviors.name: Trigger-delay (TDLY)
behaviors.description: Delays internal trigger handling to let CV sources settle before the model re-initialises — tightens up plucks/drums when the pitch CV arrives slightly after the gate.

patchIdeas.name: Self-contained percussive voice
patchIdeas.patch: Model: KICK or SNAR · BITS/RATE lowered for crunch · TRIG from clock · V/OCT fixed · internal AD shapes hit via |\VCA · OUT direct to mixer
patchIdeas.diagram:
Braids:
* Model: KICK
* Menu: BITS 8, |\VCA ON

- Clock (Out) t> Braids (TRIG)
- Braids (OUT) -> Mixer (In)

patchIdeas.name: META-morphing texture
patchIdeas.patch: Menu META: ON · slow LFO into FM jack · FM attenuverter sets model sweep range · TRIG from clock so model changes are sampled on each hit · timbre evolves rhythmically across model groups
patchIdeas.diagram:
Braids:
* Menu: META ON

- Keyboard (Pitch) p> Braids (V/OCT)
- Slow LFO (Out) >> Braids (FM) // selects model
- Clock (Out) t> Braids (TRIG)
- Braids (OUT) -> Filter (In) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Drifting analog-style bass
patchIdeas.patch: Model: CSAW · menu DRFT 2 + FLAT 1 for VCO-flavoured instability · sequencer on V/OCT · envelope into TIMBRE CV for filter-like sweep · feels like a vintage VCO
patchIdeas.diagram:
Braids:
* Model: CSAW
* Menu: DRFT 2, FLAT 1

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Braids (V/OCT)
- Sequencer (Gate) g> Envelope (Trig)
- Envelope (Out) >> Braids (TIMBRE)
- Braids (OUT) -> Filter (In) -> VCA (In) -> Output (In)
- Envelope (Out) >> VCA (CV)

patchIdeas.name: Plucked string with quantized random
patchIdeas.patch: Model: PLUK · menu QNTZ = pentatonic, ROOT set · random CV into V/OCT is quantized internally · clock on TRIG fires the pluck · no external quantizer needed
patchIdeas.diagram:
Braids:
* Model: PLUK
* Menu: QNTZ PENTA, ROOT A

- Noise (Out) >> S&H (In)
- Clock (Out) t> S&H (Trig)
- S&H (Out) p> Braids (V/OCT) // Braids quantizes internally
- Clock (Out) t> Braids (TRIG)
- Braids (OUT) -> Reverb (In) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: FM bell with bitcrush
patchIdeas.patch: Model: FM · COARSE in bell register · menu BITS 6 for heavy crush · TIMBRE CV from envelope modulates FM index · COLOR slow-swept by LFO · 8-bit DX-style bells
patchIdeas.diagram:
Braids:
* Model: FM
* Menu: BITS 6

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Braids (V/OCT)
- Sequencer (Gate) g> Envelope (Trig)
- Envelope (Out) >> Braids (TIMBRE)
- LFO (Out) >> Braids (COLOR)
- Envelope (Out) >> VCA (CV)
- Braids (OUT) -> VCA (In) -> Reverb (In) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Wavetable scanning pad
patchIdeas.patch: Model: WTBL · slow LFO on TIMBRE scans wavetable X · slow LFO on COLOR scans Y · V/OCT from sustained chord · DRFT 1 adds breathing motion · lush evolving pad
patchIdeas.diagram:
Braids:
* Model: WTBL
* Menu: DRFT 1

- Keyboard (Pitch) p> Braids (V/OCT)
- LFO 1 (Out) >> Braids (TIMBRE)
- LFO 2 (Out) >> Braids (COLOR)
- Braids (OUT) -> Stereo Chorus (In) -> Reverb (In) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Self-playing melodic voice (TSRC AUTO)
patchIdeas.patch: Model: BELL or PLUK · menu TSRC = AUTO · sequencer on V/OCT only — no gate cable needed, Braids auto-triggers on each pitch change · internal AD shapes each note
patchIdeas.diagram:
Braids:
* Model: BELL
* Menu: TSRC AUTO, |\VCA ON

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Braids (V/OCT)
- Braids (OUT) -> Reverb (In) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Filtered noise drone
patchIdeas.patch: Model: NOIS or ZBPF · V/OCT sets the filter / tonal centre · slow LFOs on TIMBRE and COLOR modulate model parameters · sustained noise-based texture
patchIdeas.diagram:
Braids:
* Model: NOIS

- LFO 1 (Out) >> Braids (TIMBRE)
- LFO 2 (Out) >> Braids (COLOR)
- Offset (Out) p> Braids (V/OCT) // fixed tonal center
- Braids (OUT) -> Reverb (In) -> Output (In)
